identity_preservation: Candidate stays on the same field identity and authority ceiling.
qualification_evidence: stable capability field qualification predicates present
authority_check: candidate does not expand authority beyond read_public_book_context_only
evaluator_independence: Separate review owns the canary decision and candidate cannot approve itself.

rollback_plan: Restore impl://context-adequacy-v0 if canary predicates fail.
canary_scope: canary route for public-safe manuscript context checks only
non_claims: does not prove runtime replacement behavior
